note: Phase 1 (PRD Section 9): the cases module must hold >=99.5% on its corpus slice. `typeFloors` gates each in-scope type independently so unimplemented types (statute/periodical/book, Phases 2-3) do not block CI while the case gate is enforced. `accuracyFloor` is the global floor and stays 0 until all four types are implemented; the v1 release gate is 0.995 over the whole >=1200-entry corpus (PRD Sections 7.1, 7.2). Raise typeFloors as each phase lands.
